Home.heroSubtitle: Ditaket lets any citizen anonymously report electoral violations and follow the election process.
Home.searchPlaceholder: Find your polling station — number, address, or community
Home.step1Body: Search by number, address, community, or venue name.
Home.step2Body: No account, no phone number. Pick a category, describe what you saw, submit.
Home.step3Body: Volunteers verify the report; once approved it appears publicly on the station page and is shared with partner organisations.

Report.title: Report a violation
Report.subtitle: Anonymous report for {stationId}.
Report.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you saw. Do not include personal names or ballot contents.
Report.evidenceHint: Photos of ballots are prohibited (Electoral Code Art. 6). Do not upload them.
Report.successBody: Your report has been queued for moderation. It will appear on the station page once approved.

errors.captcha_required: Confirm you are not a robot.
errors.captcha_failed: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many reports. Please try again later.
errors.validation: There is a problem with the form. Please check and retry.
errors.generic: Could not submit. Please try again.

Common.unverifiedNotice: Unverified citizen report. Partner organisations review independently.
